case_definitions.name: relative time needs date helper
case_definitions.task: For the last 30 minutes of Zymtrace data, prepare the time range I should use for generated project metrics API calls.

case_definitions.name: unknown project id uses search
case_definitions.task: Find the Zymtrace project named llama-inference before we inspect its metrics.

case_definitions.name: cpu hot functions
case_definitions.task: Show the hottest CPU functions from 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 to 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00.

case_definitions.name: hot containers use entities
case_definitions.task: Which containers consumed the most CPU between 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 and 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00?

case_definitions.name: first trace discovery is meta only
case_definitions.task: Find the hottest stack traces for python workers between 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 and 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00, but do not dump full stacks yet.

case_definitions.name: high level flamegraph
case_definitions.task: Give me a CPU flamegraph for the vllm executable from 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 to 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00.

case_definitions.name: discover metrics before query
case_definitions.task: For project 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000, what metric names and attributes are active between 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 and 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00?

case_definitions.name: known metric query
case_definitions.task: For project 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000, query the known request_latency histogram for service api between 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 and 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00.

case_definitions.name: generated optimization advice
case_definitions.task: Show already-generated Zymtrace optimization recommendations for CPU traces from 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 to 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00.

case_definitions.name: raw events are explicit
case_definitions.task: For project 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000, fetch a small raw event sample between 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 and 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00 for debugging the event payload shape.

case_definitions.name: discover common filter fields
case_definitions.task: For project 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000, show the most common available filter field values across profiling events between 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 and 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00.

case_definitions.name: project top pods endpoint
case_definitions.task: For project 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000, rank the hottest Kubernetes pods between 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 and 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00.

case_definitions.name: default project metrics discovery skips search
case_definitions.task: For the default Zymtrace project, discover active GPU, CPU, model, service, token, and latency metric names between 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 and 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00.

case_definitions.name: default project raw sample skips search
case_definitions.task: For the default Zymtrace project, fetch a small raw event sample between 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 and 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00 to inspect payload shape.

case_definitions.name: cpu rank first containerized apps
case_definitions.task: Which containerized app should I optimize first by CPU cost from 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 to 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00?

case_definitions.name: gpu inference workflow starts with metrics
case_definitions.task: For the default Zymtrace project, start investigating why the vLLM inference workload has low GPU utilization between 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 and 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00 by finding the relevant GPU, CPU, and framework metrics.

case_definitions.name: gpu call tree uses hot traces
case_definitions.task: Pull the GPU call tree for the vLLM workload from 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 to 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00, but only do first-pass discovery.

case_definitions.name: selected trace drilldown is bounded
case_definitions.task: Drill into hot trace prefix_hash 981237 and fetch exactly that full trace for the CPU profile from 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 to 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00.

case_definitions.name: full trace error recovers to discovery
case_definitions.task: The previous Zymtrace hot_traces call failed because meta_only=false was requested without a selected prefix_hash. Recover by doing first-pass CPU hot trace discovery for the default project between 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 and 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00.

case_definitions.name: hot trace discovery is bounded
case_definitions.task: Show only the top 3 hot trace candidates as metadata for CPU between 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 and 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00. Do not return full stacks yet.

case_definitions.name: resource fallback hot functions
case_definitions.task: In this tool-only Zymtrace matrix, choose the fallback call for the topfunctions MCP resource to rank hottest CPU functions between 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 and 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00.

case_definitions.name: project json flamegraph stays project scoped
case_definitions.task: For the default Zymtrace project, generate JSON flamegraph data for downstream processing between 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 and 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00.

case_definitions.name: project event aggregate counts
case_definitions.task: For project 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000, aggregate profiling event counts by kind between 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 and 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00.

case_definitions.name: host metadata aggregation
case_definitions.task: For project 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000, aggregate host metadata between 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 and 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00 to see OS, GPU, and architecture attributes.

case_definitions.name: project top architectures endpoint
case_definitions.task: For project 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000, rank the CPU architectures present in the profiling data between 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 and 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00.

case_definitions.name: project top clusters endpoint
case_definitions.task: For project 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000, rank the Kubernetes clusters contributing the most profiling activity between 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 and 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00.

case_definitions.name: project top containers endpoint
case_definitions.task: For project 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000, use the generated project stats endpoint to rank containers by profiling activity between 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 and 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00.

case_definitions.name: project top deployments endpoint
case_definitions.task: For project 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000, rank Kubernetes deployments by profiling activity between 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 and 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00.

case_definitions.name: project top hosts endpoint
case_definitions.task: For project 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000, rank hosts by profiling activity between 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 and 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00.

case_definitions.name: project top executables endpoint
case_definitions.task: For project 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000, rank main executable names by profiling activity between 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 and 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00.

case_definitions.name: project top namespaces endpoint
case_definitions.task: For project 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000, rank Kubernetes namespaces by profiling activity between 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 and 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00.

case_definitions.name: project top scripts endpoint
case_definitions.task: For project 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000, rank script names by profiling activity between 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 and 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00.

case_definitions.name: project top threads endpoint
case_definitions.task: For project 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000, rank thread names by profiling activity between 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 and 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00.

case_definitions.name: project top user tags endpoint
case_definitions.task: For project 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000, rank custom user tags by profiling activity between 2026-06-25T04:00:00+00:00 and 2026-06-25T05:00:00+00:00.
